scientific_integrity.detail: This skill produces structured calculation or lookup outputs rather than empirical research findings, so scientific integrity review is not applicable.

practice_boundaries.detail: The skill operates within chemistry and laboratory computation scope and does not generate clinical or diagnostic decision outputs.

methodological_ground.detail: No experimental methodology claims are made; the skill generates deterministic structured calculation or lookup outputs without asserting scientific conclusions.

code_usability.detail: Any code produced by this skill is utility-oriented, not bioinformatics analysis code; research veto code review is not applicable.

functional_suitability.note: PubChem REST API fallback documented in Error Handling; direct lookup URLs added; DB_VERSION tracking documented. PubChem fallback not implemented in script.

reliability.note: Unknown compounds include direct PubChem/ChemSpider URLs and API fallback; DB versioning documented.

performance_context.note: SKILL.md 171 lines — lean; local database limitation is a known documented constraint.

agent_usability.note: Clear workflow and conversion table; SMILES quick reference useful; batch summary line mandated in Output Requirements.

human_usability.note: Description is discoverable; SMILES notation may be unfamiliar but scope is appropriate for cheminformatics.

security.note: No hardcoded secrets; no injection vectors; pure lookup/conversion skill. No path traversal check for batch CSV input.

maintainability.note: DB_VERSION tracking and update procedure documented in Error Handling; clean structure.

agent_specific.note: Trigger precision good; escape hatches for docking/activity prediction present; PubChem fallback improves composability for novel compounds.

assertions.note: Confirmed: output flags the compound as not found in as expected.

assertions.note: Confirmed: output suggests pubchem or chemspider for external lookup as expected.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate SMILES or identifiers for unknown compound
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output provides a direct PubChem lookup URL for the compound name
assertions.note: Confirmed: output provides a direct pubchem lookup url for as expected.

key_strengths: SMILES quick reference section is a practical embedded cheat sheet for agents and users
Conversion direction table (Name→SMILES, SMILES→IUPAC, etc.) with use cases makes the skill self-documenting
Strong fabrication guard: unknown compounds are flagged rather than guessed
PubChem REST API fallback and direct lookup URLs documented for unknown compounds
DB_VERSION tracking and update procedure documented — closes the database versioning gap

recommendations.title: PubChem API fallback documented but not implemented in script
recommendations.problem: Error Handling documents the PubChem REST API fallback endpoint, but the script does not automatically query it when a compound is not found locally.
recommendations.root_cause: PubChem API integration was deferred; the skill ships with a minimal local database.
recommendations.fix: Implement the PubChem REST API fallback in scripts/main.py: when a compound is not found locally, automatically query https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/rest/pug/compound/name/{name}/JSON and return the result.

recommendations.title: No input path validation for batch CSV file
recommendations.problem: Batch mode accepts a CSV file path without documented path traversal rejection.
recommendations.root_cause: Error Handling does not include a path validation rule for batch file inputs.
recommendations.fix: Add to Error Handling: 'If the batch input file path contains ../ or points outside the workspace, reject with a path traversal warning before opening the file.'
